test_name: Document title (root /login) › React migration uses a different document title
react_behavior: Browser document title is Admin Dashboard (React).

test_name: Favicon link › React app does not expose the same favicon link as Angular
angular_behavior: Head includes link rel=icon referencing favicon.ico.
react_behavior: Head has no link rel=icon element.

test_name: Login page primary heading element › React does not expose Login as an h2 heading
angular_behavior: Login label is rendered as an h2 element inside the card.
react_behavior: Login label is only the Card title (no h2 role for Login).

test_name: Main content wrapper CSS class › React uses .app-content instead of .content for the main region
angular_behavior: Main routed content sits in a div with class content.
react_behavior: Main routed content sits in a div with class app-content (no content class).

test_name: 401 Unauthorized page root layout class › React uses error-page wrapper instead of unauthorized-container
react_behavior: 401 page root uses class error-page and omits unauthorized-container.

test_name: 403 Forbidden page root layout class › React uses error-page wrapper instead of forbidden-container
react_behavior: 403 page root uses class error-page and omits forbidden-container.

test_name: 404 Not Found page root layout class › React uses error-page wrapper instead of error-container
react_behavior: 404 page root uses class error-page and omits error-container.

test_name: Payment order details while request is in flight › React shows a loading message instead of the Angular empty-state copy
angular_behavior: While GET /paymentOrders/:id is pending, UI shows the empty branch copy "No payment order selected".
react_behavior: While the same request is pending, UI shows a Loading… message instead of that empty copy.
